section.heading: Cooperation of Federal agencies
section.chapeau: Any Federal entity conducting or supporting activities directly affecting the park shall—

paragraph.content: consult with, cooperate with, and to the maximum extent practicable, coordinate its activities with the Secretary; and

paragraph.chapeau: conduct or support such activities in a manner which—

subparagraph.content: to the maximum extent practicable is consistent with the standards and criteria established pursuant to section 410ww–22(b)(9) of this title; and
to the maximum extent practicable will not have an adverse effect on the historic resources of the park.
